raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2024, I was alerted to a charge on my credit card via text message to verify a charge at XXXX. I immediately went online to verify that the card was being charged by several vendors and it was not being used by me. I immediately called Citi to let them know that this was not me. They opened a dispute and sent me a new card. However, in XXXX I received a letter stating that the dispute was closed and I would be charged for the transactions. This was not a charge by me and I have been banking with Citi for years and would not dispute something I clearly charged. They have not provided me with any documentation to the sort about how they came to this erroneous conclusion.
